author: felix314159_
content: as some of you know, yesterday steel released the first [focil tests release](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/issues/3007). in addition to these tests, there also is a [focil hive simulator](https://github.com/felix314159/hive/pull/3) available with more tests (different than the steel tests, so you should ensure you pass both). so far we have been successfully testing with besu and ethrex, and it would be nice to have more client teams participate. please let me know as soon as any other client is ready, or feel free to post a status update so that we can get an overview of how much progress the different clients have made
